name: Buy Portable Cabin
description:
Buy Portable Cabin — In Stock, Delivered in 7-21 Days

If you are ready to buy a portable cabin, SAMAN can have one at your site in 7 working days. Here is exactly what happens from the moment you contact us to the day it arrives.

What You Get When You Buy a Portable Cabin from SAMAN

Your cabin leaves our factory fully assembled and quality-checked. You do not arrange any construction at your site. The unit arrives ready to use.

Every cabin comes pre-fitted with an MS frame structure, insulated wall panels, one lockable door, two windows, internal wiring for lighting and one fan point, and a false ceiling. Wall insulation type — rock wool or PUF — is confirmed at order stage based on your location and use.

If you have ordered a cabin with an attached toilet, you connect the water supply line at site. Electricity supply line connection is required for all units.

No cabin leaves our Bangalore or Greater Noida factory with pending work.

A finished portable cabin ready for delivery — MS frame structure, insulated panels, custom window and door configuration. SAMAN builds every unit complete before it leaves the factory.

How to Place Your Order — 4 Steps

Step 1 — Send your requirement. Call us on +91 97089 89937 or fill the quote form on this page. Tell us: size needed, intended use, delivery location, and required timeline.

Step 2 — Receive your quote within 24 hours. We send a written quote with price, size confirmation, lead time, and delivery cost to your location.

Step 3 — Confirm and pay 50% advance. Once you approve the quote, pay 50% to confirm your order. Production or dispatch from stock begins within 48 hours of advance receipt.

Step 4 — Delivery to your site. We handle transportation. Your cabin arrives on the confirmed date. Our team handles offloading.

Total time from advance payment to delivery: 7 working days for standard sizes in stock.

This is what arrives at your site after you place an order — a complete, factory-tested cabin with door, windows, and wiring fitted. No on-site construction. No assembly required.

Delivery Areas and Lead Time

Standard 7-day delivery covers Bangalore and districts within 100 km, Hyderabad and Secunderabad, Chennai and surrounding areas, and Greater Noida and Delhi NCR.

For locations outside these zones, delivery takes 10–14 working days. We deliver pan-India. Delivery cost for outstation locations is quoted separately and stated in writing before you confirm.

Before delivery day, have ready: a levelled surface for the cabin, clear vehicle access to the drop point — minimum 10 feet wide — and an electricity connection point nearby.

If you want to review available sizes before confirming your spec, visit our portable cabin page.

Portable cabins are not just for sites and offices. This unit is placed in a residential backyard — delivered complete, ready to use the same day it arrives.

Price, Advance Payment, and What Is Included

Standard portable cabins start at Rs 1,95,000.

This price includes the fully assembled and tested cabin unit, transportation to your site within standard delivery zones, and offloading at site.

This price does not include site levelling or foundation work, electricity or water connection at site, or custom additions such as an AC unit, extra windows, or partition walls. These are quoted and confirmed separately before advance payment.

Payment terms: 50% advance to confirm the order. Balance 50% on delivery day, before offloading begins.

If you need a fitted workspace — with AC, partition walls, and office interior — rather than a standard unit, review our office portable cabin page before confirming your specs with us.

Why Buy Direct from SAMAN Instead of a Marketplace

Platforms like IndiaMART list 40 to 50 suppliers for the same search. Prices look similar on screen. The difference shows up after you pay — in response time, in what the warranty actually covers, and in whether anyone picks up the phone when you need a change.

When you buy directly from SAMAN: you have one contact from order to delivery, a factory warranty on the unit rather than a reseller's assurance, query response within 4 business hours, no middleman margin added to your price, and direct communication if you need to adjust your spec mid-order.

If you are considering a multi-cabin layout, connecting units, or an expandable configuration, that can only be arranged directly with the factory. See our modular portable cabin page if you need more than a single standard unit.

A SAMAN portable cabin placed and ready at a residential property — factory warranty, single-contact purchase, delivered with no middleman markup.

Questions Buyers Ask Before Placing an Order

Q: How much advance payment is required to confirm a portable cabin order?

50% of the total order value is required as advance. The balance 50% is due on delivery day before offloading begins.

Q: Is transportation to my site included in the portable cabin price?

Yes — transportation is included for standard delivery zones: Bangalore, Hyderabad, Chennai, and Greater Noida. For locations outside these zones, delivery cost is quoted separately and confirmed in writing before you pay the advance.

Q: Can I visit the SAMAN factory before placing an order?

Yes. Our Bangalore factory is open Monday to Saturday, 10 am to 5 pm. Call +91 97089 89937 to schedule a visit. You can inspect current stock units and confirm your spec in person before paying anything.

Q: How long after advance payment does dispatch happen?

For standard sizes in stock, dispatch happens within 48 hours of advance receipt. For custom sizes, production begins within 48 hours and takes 5 to 7 additional working days before dispatch.

Ready to place your order?

Call us on +91 97089 89937 or fill the quote form below. Tell us your size, location, and timeline — we will send a written quote within 24 hours. Delivery across South India and Greater Noida in 7 working days.
short_description:
📦 20×20×8.6 ft — in stock, ships in 48 hrs · Office · Shop · Site · Residence · Factory-direct. No middleman.

Buy portable cabin — 20×20×8.6 ft MS structure, factory-built and quality-checked before dispatch. Pre-fitted with insulated walls, lockable door, windows, wiring, and false ceiling. Pay 50% advance, balance on delivery. Delivered to your site in 7-21 working days. No construction needed at site.

Size
20×20×8.6 ft
Capacity
6–8 people
Frame
MS frame · insulated walls
Stock
Standard sizes in stock
Delivery
7 working days
Payment
50% advance · 50% delivery
Starting Price
Rs 1,95,000
Coverage
South India · Pan-India
📞 Call to confirm stock: +91 97089 89937
Factory direct · Bangalore & Greater Noida
